scripts.dashboard: python -m uv run --cache-dir .uv-cache --frozen --no-sync python -m bin.radar serve-dashboard
scripts.lint: python -m uv run --cache-dir .uv-cache --frozen --no-sync ruff check apps bin services scoring ranking ingestion tests
scripts.typecheck: python -m uv run --cache-dir .uv-cache --frozen --no-sync mypy apps bin services scoring ranking ingestion tests
scripts.build: python -m uv run --cache-dir .uv-cache --frozen --no-sync python -m compileall apps services bin scoring ranking ingestion
scripts.db:migrate: python -m uv run --cache-dir .uv-cache --frozen --no-sync python -m bin.radar db-upgrade
